TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit SKImageFilter extends SkiaSharp.SKObject

Docs.summary: Image filters for use with the property of a .

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateArithmetic (float k1, float k2, float k3, float k4, bool enforcePMColor, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? background);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateArithmetic(float32 k1, float32 k2, float32 k3, float32 k4, bool enforcePMColor, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter background) cil managed

Docs.param: The first arithmetic blend coefficient.
The second arithmetic blend coefficient.
The third arithmetic blend coefficient.
The fourth arithmetic blend coefficient.
Whether to enforce premultiplied colors in the result.
The background image filter, or to use the source bitmap.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that combines two images using the arithmetic blend formula: result = k1*src*dst + k2*src + k3*dst + k4.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateArithmetic (float k1, float k2, float k3, float k4, bool enforcePMColor, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? background, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? foreground);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateArithmetic(float32 k1, float32 k2, float32 k3, float32 k4, bool enforcePMColor, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter background, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter foreground) cil managed

Docs.param: The first arithmetic blend coefficient.
The second arithmetic blend coefficient.
The third arithmetic blend coefficient.
The fourth arithmetic blend coefficient.
Whether to enforce premultiplied colors in the result.
The background image filter, or to use the source bitmap.
The foreground image filter, or to use the source bitmap.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that combines two images using the arithmetic blend formula: result = k1*src*dst + k2*src + k3*dst + k4.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateArithmetic (float k1, float k2, float k3, float k4, bool enforcePMColor, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? background, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? foreground, SkiaSharp.SKRect cropRect);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateArithmetic(float32 k1, float32 k2, float32 k3, float32 k4, bool enforcePMColor, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter background, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter foreground, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cropRect) cil managed

Docs.param: The first arithmetic blend coefficient.
The second arithmetic blend coefficient.
The third arithmetic blend coefficient.
The fourth arithmetic blend coefficient.
Whether to enforce premultiplied colors in the result.
The background image filter, or to use the source bitmap.
The foreground image filter, or to use the source bitmap.
The rectangle to which the output processing will be limited.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that combines two images using the arithmetic blend formula: result = k1*src*dst + k2*src + k3*dst + k4.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateBlendMode (SkiaSharp.SKBlender blender, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? background);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateBlendMode(class SkiaSharp.SKBlender blender, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter background) cil managed

Docs.param: The custom blender to use.
The background image filter, or to use the source bitmap.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that blends two images using the specified blend mode.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

Docs.param: The blend mode to use.
The background image filter, or to use the source bitmap.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that blends two images using the specified blend mode.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateBlur(float32 sigmaX, float32 sigmaY) cil managed

Docs.param: The Gaussian blur standard deviation in the X direction.
The Gaussian blur standard deviation in the Y direction.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies a Gaussian blur.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

The input filter to use, or to use the source bitmap.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies a Gaussian blur.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateCompose (SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter outer, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter inner);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateCompose(class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter outer, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter inner) cil managed

Docs.param: The outer (second) filter to apply.
The inner (first) filter to apply.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter, whose effect is to first apply the inner filter and then apply the outer filter to the result of the inner.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateDisplacementMapEffect (SkiaSharp.SKColorChannel xChannelSelector, SkiaSharp.SKColorChannel yChannelSelector, float scale, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter displacement);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateDisplacementMapEffect(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorChannel xChannelSelector, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorChannel yChannelSelector, float32 scale, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter displacement) cil managed

Docs.param: The color channel to use for X displacement.
The color channel to use for Y displacement.
The displacement scale factor.
The displacement map filter.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that uses one image to displace pixels in another.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

Docs.param: The direction of the light.
The color of the light.
The surface height scale factor for bump mapping.
The diffuse lighting constant.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies distant light diffuse lighting using bump mapping.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateDistantLitSpecular (SkiaSharp.SKPoint3 direction, SkiaSharp.SKColor lightColor, float surfaceScale, float ks, float shininess);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateDistantLitSpecular(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPoint3 direction, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor lightColor, float32 surfaceScale, float32 ks, float32 shininess) cil managed

Docs.param: The direction of the light.
The color of the light.
The surface height scale factor for bump mapping.
The specular lighting constant.
The specular highlight exponent (higher values create tighter highlights).
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies distant light specular lighting using bump mapping.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

The Y offset of the shadow.

Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateImage (SkiaSharp.SKImage image);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateImage(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image) cil managed

Docs.param: The image to draw.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that draws an image.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateImage (SkiaSharp.SKImage image, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateImage(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling) cil managed

Docs.param: The source image.
The sampling options for the transformation.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter from an image.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateImage (SkiaSharp.SKImage image, SkiaSharp.SKRect src, SkiaSharp.SKRect dst, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateImage(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect dst, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling) cil managed

Docs.param: The source image.
The source rectangle to tile.
The destination rectangle where tiles are drawn.
The sampling options for the transformation.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter from an image.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMagnifier (SkiaSharp.SKRect lensBounds, float zoomAmount, float inset, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMagnifier(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect lensBounds, float32 zoomAmount, float32 inset, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling) cil managed

Docs.param: The bounds of the magnifier lens.
The zoom magnification factor.
The inset amount for the magnifier effect.
The sampling options for the transformation.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies a magnifier effect.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMagnifier (SkiaSharp.SKRect lensBounds, float zoomAmount, float inset, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? input);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMagnifier(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect lensBounds, float32 zoomAmount, float32 inset, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter input) cil managed

Docs.param: The bounds of the magnifier lens.
The zoom magnification factor.
The inset amount for the magnifier effect.
The sampling options for the transformation.
The input filter to use, or to use the source bitmap.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies a magnifier effect.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

The inset amount for the magnifier effect.
The sampling options for the transformation.
The input filter to use, or to use the source bitmap.
The rectangle to which the output processing will be limited.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies a magnifier effect.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMatrixConvolution (SkiaSharp.SKSizeI kernelSize, ReadOnlySpan<float> kernel, float gain, float bias, SkiaSharp.SKPointI kernelOffset, SkiaSharp.SKShaderTileMode tileMode, bool convolveAlpha);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMatrixConvolution(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKSizeI kernelSize, valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<float32> kernel, float32 gain, float32 bias, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPointI kernelOffset, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKShaderTileMode tileMode, bool convolveAlpha) cil managed

Docs.param: The size of the convolution kernel.
The convolution kernel values.
The gain factor applied to each pixel.
The bias added to each pixel after applying the kernel.
The offset within the kernel for the source pixel.
The tile mode for edge handling.
Whether to also convolve the alpha channel.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies a matrix convolution.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMatrixConvolution (SkiaSharp.SKSizeI kernelSize, ReadOnlySpan<float> kernel, float gain, float bias, SkiaSharp.SKPointI kernelOffset, SkiaSharp.SKShaderTileMode tileMode, bool convolveAlpha, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? input);

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMatrixConvolution(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKSizeI kernelSize, valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<float32> kernel, float32 gain, float32 bias, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPointI kernelOffset, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKShaderTileMode tileMode, bool convolveAlpha, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter input) cil managed

Docs.param: The size of the convolution kernel.
The convolution kernel values.
The gain factor applied to each pixel.
The bias added to each pixel after applying the kernel.
The offset within the kernel for the source pixel.
The tile mode for edge handling.
Whether to also convolve the alpha channel.
The input filter to use, or to use the source bitmap.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies a matrix convolution.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateMatrixConvolution(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKSizeI kernelSize, valuetype System.ReadOnlySpan`1<float32> kernel, float32 gain, float32 bias, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKPointI kernelOffset, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKShaderTileMode tileMode, bool convolveAlpha, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter input, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect cropRect) cil managed

The convolution kernel values.
The gain factor applied to each pixel.
The bias added to each pixel after applying the kernel.
The offset within the kernel for the source pixel.
The tile mode for edge handling.

The input filter to use, or to use the source bitmap.

The diffuse lighting constant.

Docs.param: The position of the light.
The color of the light.
The surface height scale factor for bump mapping.
The specular lighting constant.
The specular highlight exponent (higher values create tighter highlights).
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that applies point light specular lighting using bump mapping.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

The destination rectangle where tiles are drawn.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateTile (SkiaSharp.SKRect src, SkiaSharp.SKRect dst, SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter? input);
.method public static hidebysig class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter CreateTile(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect src, valuetype SkiaSharp.SKRect dst, class SkiaSharp.SKImageFilter input) cil managed

Docs.param: The pixels to tile.
The pixels where the tiles are drawn.
The input filter to use.
Docs.summary: Creates an image filter that tiles the image being drawn.
Docs.returns: Returns the new , or on error.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);
.method familyhidebysig virtual instance void Dispose(bool disposing) cil managed

Docs.param: to release both managed and unmanaged resources; to release only unmanaged resources.
Docs.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the and optionally releases the managed resources.
Docs.remarks: Always dispose the object before you release your last reference to the . Otherwise, the resources it is using will not be freed until the garbage collector calls the finalizer.
